name: Vampire Ghost
name_jp: ヴァンパイアの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>幽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鬼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Normal Summoned: You can send 1 other "Vampire" card from your hand or face-up field to the GY; add 1 Level 4 or higher "Vampire" monster from your Deck to your hand, and if you do, send 1 Level 2 or lower "Vampire" monster from your Deck to the GY. During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your GY and pay 500 LP; immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 "Vampire" monster. You can only use each effect of "Vampire Ghost" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal Summoned: You can send 1 other "Vampire" card from your hand or face-up field to the GY; add 1 Level 4 or higher "Vampire" monster from your Deck to your hand, and if you do, send 1 Level 2 or lower "Vampire" monster from your Deck to the GY. During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your GY and pay 500 LP; immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 "Vampire" monster. You can only use each effect of "Vampire Ghost" once per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
